Bus Timings

9 Bus Timetable Ghubaiba Bus Station to Business Bay Metro Seaside

December 14, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Listen up, Dubai explorers! Bus 9 is your secret weapon for getting around on the cheap. Running from Ghubaiba to Business Bay Metro Seaside, this route hits all the hotspots without the hassle. Buses come often, so no long waits. Plus, you’ll see a ton of cool landmarks along the way. Next time you’re out, hop on Bus 9. It might just become your new favorite way to cruise the city!

Route Name 9
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 45 - Business Bay Metro Seaside
Total Distance Approximately 10-15 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 53 minutes
Operational Hours 04:12 to 00:57 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 9

Bus 9 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The Bus 9 operates with frequent departures throughout the day from both terminus points. The timings are as follows:

Bus 9 Timetable

To check the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or click this link for 9 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 9 is determined by the number of zones traveled, with a standard rate of AED 3 for a single zone. This economical pricing makes it a practical choice for daily commuters and visitors, providing affordable access to a range of destinations across Dubai. Regular fare updates and promotional offers may be available, so passengers should check the latest details before traveling.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 9 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can purchase tickets directly from the bus or at designated bus stations. For up-to-date information on bus schedules and routes, passengers can use the RTA Dubai app, which provides real-time updates and route details for easier trip planning and convenience. Additionally, the app allows users to track buses in real-time, enhancing the travel experience.

Bus Route

The Bus 9 route covers a wide range of stops, linking vital locations in Dubai. Here is the complete list of stops along the route:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 45

  2. Department of Ports & Customs

  3. Al Mina Road

  4. Capital Hotel

  5. Hudheiba

  6. Etihad Museum

7.

  1. Jumeirah Centre

  2. Century Plaza

  3. Beach Center

  4. Dubai Islamic Bank

  5. Mercato Shopping Mall

  6. Hassa Bint Al Murr Masjid

  7. Suhail Bin Jumaa Masjid

Recommended Guides

  1. Al Arooba Street

  2. Box Park 1

  3. Dar Al Ber Society

  4. Street 35A

  5. Al Ittihad Health Center

  6. Emarat Headquarters, Street 35

  7. Lufthansa

  8. Safa, Terminus

  9. Business Bay Metro Seaside

Bus 9 Station Overview

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 45

Ghubaiba Bus Station is a significant transit hub serving the central area of Dubai. Its strategic location and comprehensive services make it a key point for commuters navigating Dubai’s public transport system.

Business Bay Metro Seaside

Business Bay Metro Station Seaside is strategically located in the vibrant Business Bay district, a major commercial and residential hub in Dubai. This station not only provides convenient access to the Dubai Metro but also serves as a crucial intersection for Bus Routes 7, 9, 14, 91, and F20.

Offering seamless connections to various parts of the city, it caters to the needs of daily commuters, professionals, and visitors. The station is equipped with modern amenities and is situated near waterfront developments and key business hubs, making it an essential transit point for those traveling within and beyond the Business Bay area.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 9 passes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai. Here’s a brief overview of some highlights along the route:

  1. Etihad Museum: A prominent museum showcasing the history of the United Arab Emirates with interactive exhibits and historical artifacts.

  2. Jumeirah, Grand Masjid: A stunning mosque that is an architectural marvel and a key cultural landmark in Dubai, offering insights into Islamic architecture.

  3. Mercato Shopping Mall: A uniquely designed shopping mall that combines Italian Renaissance architecture with a variety of shopping and dining options.

4.

  1. Dubai Islamic Bank: While primarily a financial institution, it is located in a central area with various nearby attractions and services.

  2. Jumeirah Centre: A popular shopping destination with a range of retail outlets, dining options, and services.

These stops make Bus 9 a convenient route for exploring cultural sites, shopping, and dining experiences in Dubai.

Journey Experience

The 9 bus route from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Business Bay Metro Seaside offers a lengthy yet captivating journey through some of Dubai’s most vibrant neighborhoods. Departing from Ghubaiba, known for its historic significance and proximity to Dubai Creek, the bus passes through Al Karama, where travelers can experience a mix of local shops and dining options.

The route continues along Sheikh Zayed Road, showcasing the city’s impressive architecture and modern developments.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Business Bay Metro Seaside, the final stop on the Bus 9 route, starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 45. The journey offers a range of AED 40-48, making it a convenient and cost-effective option for reaching this key destination. Whether you’re heading to the bustling Business Bay area or exploring nearby attractions, Careem provides a reliable and comfortable travel experience to your final stop on Bus 9.

Bus 9 offers a reliable connection between Ghubaiba Bus Station and Business Bay Metro Seaside, with frequent daily departures. It provides an economical travel option across Dubai’s key zones. While online booking isn’t available, the RTA Dubai app offers real-time updates and schedule details. With its affordable fares and extensive route, Bus 9 is a convenient choice for both commuters and visitors.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 14, 2025.
